info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

get.description: Retrieve a single record by its ID with options to specify field projections and output format.

schema.description: If you want to get only some fields, pass in this parameter, otherwise all visible fields will be obtained, The parameter value depends on the specified fieldKeyType to determine whether it is name or id

parameters.description: If you want to get only some fields, pass in this parameter, otherwise all visible fields will be obtained, The parameter value depends on the specified fieldKeyType to determine whether it is name or id
parameters.name: projection

schema.description: Define the return value formate, you can set it to text if you only need simple string value

parameters.description: Define the return value formate, you can set it to text if you only need simple string value
parameters.name: cellFormat

schema.description: Define the key type of record.fields[key], You can click "systemInfo" in the field edit box to get fieldId or enter the table design screen with all the field details

parameters.description: Define the key type of record.fields[key], You can click "systemInfo" in the field edit box to get fieldId or enter the table design screen with all the field details
parameters.name: fieldKeyType

fields.description: Objects with a fields key mapping fieldId or field name to value for that field.

autoNumber.description: Auto number, a unique identifier for each record

createdTime.description: Created time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

lastModifiedTime.description: Last modified time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/%7BrecordId%7D?projection=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&cellFormat=SOME_STRING_VALUE&fieldKeyType=SOME_STRING_VALUE' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/%7BrecordId%7D?projection=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&cellFormat=SOME_STRING_VALUE&fieldKeyType=SOME_STRING_VALUE", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

patch.description: Update a single record by its ID with support for field value typecast and record reordering.

fieldKeyType.description: Define the key type of record.fields[key], You can click "systemInfo" in the field edit box to get fieldId or enter the table design screen with all the field details

typecast.description: Automatic data conversion from cellValues if the typecast parameter is passed in. Automatic conversion is disabled by default to ensure data integrity, but it may be helpful for integrating with 3rd party data sources.

fields.description: Objects with a fields key mapping fieldId or field name to value for that field.

viewId.description: You can only specify order in one view when create record (will create a order index automatically)

anchorId.description: The record id to anchor to

order.description: Where this record to insert to (Optional)

schema.description: Update record by id

fields.description: Objects with a fields key mapping fieldId or field name to value for that field.

autoNumber.description: Auto number, a unique identifier for each record

createdTime.description: Created time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

lastModifiedTime.description: Last modified time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request PATCH \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/%7BrecordId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"fieldKeyType":"id","typecast":true,"record":{"fields":{"property1":null,"property2":null}},"order":{"viewId":"string","anchorId":"string","position":"before"}}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"fieldKeyType\":\"id\",\"typecast\":true,\"record\":{\"fields\":{\"property1\":null,\"property2\":null}},\"order\":{\"viewId\":\"string\",\"anchorId\":\"string\",\"position\":\"before\"}}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PATCH", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/%7BrecordId%7D", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

delete.description: Permanently delete a single record by its ID.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request DELETE \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/%7BrecordId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("DELETE", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/%7BrecordId%7D", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.description: Retrieve a list of records with support for filtering, sorting, grouping, and pagination. The response includes record data and optional group information.

schema.description: If you want to get only some fields, pass in this parameter, otherwise all visible fields will be obtained, The parameter value depends on the specified fieldKeyType to determine whether it is name or id

parameters.description: If you want to get only some fields, pass in this parameter, otherwise all visible fields will be obtained, The parameter value depends on the specified fieldKeyType to determine whether it is name or id
parameters.name: projection

schema.description: Define the return value formate, you can set it to text if you only need simple string value

parameters.description: Define the return value formate, you can set it to text if you only need simple string value
parameters.name: cellFormat

schema.description: Define the key type of record.fields[key], You can click "systemInfo" in the field edit box to get fieldId or enter the table design screen with all the field details

parameters.description: Define the key type of record.fields[key], You can click "systemInfo" in the field edit box to get fieldId or enter the table design screen with all the field details
parameters.name: fieldKeyType

schema.description: Set the view you want to fetch, default is first view. result will filter and sort by view options.

parameters.description: Set the view you want to fetch, default is first view. result will filter and sort by view options.
parameters.name: viewId

schema.description: When a viewId is specified, configure this to true will ignore the view's filter, sort, etc

parameters.description: When a viewId is specified, configure this to true will ignore the view's filter, sort, etc
parameters.name: ignoreViewQuery

schema.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

parameters.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.
parameters.name: filter

schema.description: Search for records that match the specified field and value

parameters.description: Search for records that match the specified field and value
parameters.name: search

schema.description: Filter out the records that can be selected by a given link cell from the relational table. For example, if the specified field is one to many or one to one relationship, recordId for which the field has already been selected will not appear.

parameters.description: Filter out the records that can be selected by a given link cell from the relational table. For example, if the specified field is one to many or one to one relationship, recordId for which the field has already been selected will not appear.
parameters.name: filterLinkCellCandidate

schema.description: Filter out selected records based on this link cell from the relational table. Note that viewId, filter, and orderBy will not take effect in this case because selected records has it own order. Ignoring recordId gets all the selected records for the field

parameters.description: Filter out selected records based on this link cell from the relational table. Note that viewId, filter, and orderBy will not take effect in this case because selected records has it own order. Ignoring recordId gets all the selected records for the field
parameters.name: filterLinkCellSelected

schema.description: Filter selected records by record ids

parameters.description: Filter selected records by record ids
parameters.name: selectedRecordIds

schema.description: An array of sort objects that specifies how the records should be ordered.

parameters.description: An array of sort objects that specifies how the records should be ordered.
parameters.name: orderBy

schema.description: An array of group objects that specifies how the records should be grouped.

parameters.description: An array of group objects that specifies how the records should be grouped.
parameters.name: groupBy

schema.description: An array of group ids that specifies which groups are collapsed

parameters.description: An array of group ids that specifies which groups are collapsed
parameters.name: collapsedGroupIds

schema.description: When provided, other query parameters will be merged with the saved ones.

parameters.description: When provided, other query parameters will be merged with the saved ones.
parameters.name: queryId

schema.description: The record count you want to take, maximum is 1000

parameters.description: The record count you want to take, maximum is 1000
parameters.name: take

schema.description: The records count you want to skip

parameters.description: The records count you want to skip
parameters.name: skip

fields.description: Objects with a fields key mapping fieldId or field name to value for that field.

autoNumber.description: Auto number, a unique identifier for each record

createdTime.description: Created time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

lastModifiedTime.description: Last modified time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

allGroupHeaderRefs.description: All group header refs for the view, including collapsed group headers

searchHitIndex.description: The index of the records that match the search, highlight the records

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record?projection=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&cellFormat=SOME_STRING_VALUE&fieldKeyType=SOME_STRING_VALUE&viewId=viwXXXXXXX&ignoreViewQuery=SOME_STRING_VALUE&filterByTql=%7Bfield%7D+%3D+%27Completed%27+AND+%7Bfield%7D+%3E+5&filter=SOME_STRING_VALUE&search=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&filterLinkCellCandidate=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellCandidate=recXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=recXXXXXXX&selectedRecordIds=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&orderBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&groupBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&collapsedGroupIds=SOME_STRING_VALUE&queryId=qry_xxxxxxxx&take=100&skip=0' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record?projection=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&cellFormat=SOME_STRING_VALUE&fieldKeyType=SOME_STRING_VALUE&viewId=viwXXXXXXX&ignoreViewQuery=SOME_STRING_VALUE&filterByTql=%7Bfield%7D+%3D+%27Completed%27+AND+%7Bfield%7D+%3E+5&filter=SOME_STRING_VALUE&search=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&filterLinkCellCandidate=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellCandidate=recXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=recXXXXXXX&selectedRecordIds=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&orderBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&groupBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&collapsedGroupIds=SOME_STRING_VALUE&queryId=qry_xxxxxxxx&take=100&skip=0", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

post.description: Create one or multiple records with support for field value typecast and custom record ordering.

fieldKeyType.description: Define the key type of record.fields[key], You can click "systemInfo" in the field edit box to get fieldId or enter the table design screen with all the field details

typecast.description: Automatic data conversion from cellValues if the typecast parameter is passed in. Automatic conversion is disabled by default to ensure data integrity, but it may be helpful for integrating with 3rd party data sources.

viewId.description: You can only specify order in one view when create record (will create a order index automatically)

anchorId.description: The record id to anchor to

order.description: Where this record to insert to (Optional)

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"fieldKeyType":"id","typecast":true,"order":{"viewId":"string","anchorId":"string","position":"before"},"records":[{"fields":{"single line text":"text value"}}]}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"fieldKeyType\":\"id\",\"typecast\":true,\"order\":{\"viewId\":\"string\",\"anchorId\":\"string\",\"position\":\"before\"},\"records\":[{\"fields\":{\"single line text\":\"text value\"}}]}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.description: Retrieve the change history of a specific record, including field modifications and user information.

200.description: Get the history list for a record

name.description: The name of the field. can not be duplicated in the table.

type.description: The field types supported by teable.

cellValueType.description: The cell value type of the field.

isLookup.description: Whether this field is lookup field. witch means cellValue and [fieldType] is looked up from the linked table.

isConditionalLookup.description: Whether this lookup field applies a conditional filter when resolving linked records.

isConditionalLookup.description: Whether this lookup field applies a conditional filter when resolving linked records.

post.description: Upload an attachment from a file or URL and append it to the cell

schema.description: ID of an attachment field

parameters.description: ID of an attachment field
parameters.name: fieldId

fields.description: Objects with a fields key mapping fieldId or field name to value for that field.

autoNumber.description: Auto number, a unique identifier for each record

createdTime.description: Created time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

lastModifiedTime.description: Last modified time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/%7BrecordId%7D/%7BfieldId%7D/uploadAttachment \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: multipart/form-data' \
  --form file=string \
  --form fileUrl=string

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "-----011000010111000001101001\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name=\"file\"\r\n\r\nstring\r\n-----011000010111000001101001\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name=\"fileUrl\"\r\n\r\nstring\r\n-----011000010111000001101001--\r\n"

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("POST", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/%7BrecordId%7D/%7BfieldId%7D/uploadAttachment", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/%7BrecordId%7D/%7BfieldId%7D/insertAttachment \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"attachments":[{"id":"string","name":"string","path":"string","token":"string","size":0,"mimetype":"string","presignedUrl":"string","width":0,"height":0,"smThumbnailUrl":"string","lgThumbnailUrl":"string"}],"anchorId":"string"}'

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"attachments\":[{\"id\":\"string\",\"name\":\"string\",\"path\":\"string\",\"token\":\"string\",\"size\":0,\"mimetype\":\"string\",\"presignedUrl\":\"string\",\"width\":0,\"height\":0,\"smThumbnailUrl\":\"string\",\"lgThumbnailUrl\":\"string\"}],\"anchorId\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",

schema.description: The records count you want to skip

parameters.description: The records count you want to skip
parameters.name: skip

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/%7BrecordId%7D/status?projection=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&cellFormat=SOME_STRING_VALUE&fieldKeyType=SOME_STRING_VALUE&viewId=viwXXXXXXX&ignoreViewQuery=SOME_STRING_VALUE&filterByTql=%7Bfield%7D+%3D+%27Completed%27+AND+%7Bfield%7D+%3E+5&filter=SOME_STRING_VALUE&search=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&filterLinkCellCandidate=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellCandidate=recXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=recXXXXXXX&selectedRecordIds=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&orderBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&groupBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&collapsedGroupIds=SOME_STRING_VALUE&queryId=qry_xxxxxxxx&take=100&skip=0' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/%7BrecordId%7D/status?projection=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&cellFormat=SOME_STRING_VALUE&fieldKeyType=SOME_STRING_VALUE&viewId=viwXXXXXXX&ignoreViewQuery=SOME_STRING_VALUE&filterByTql=%7Bfield%7D+%3D+%27Completed%27+AND+%7Bfield%7D+%3E+5&filter=SOME_STRING_VALUE&search=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&filterLinkCellCandidate=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellCandidate=recXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=recXXXXXXX&selectedRecordIds=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&orderBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&groupBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&collapsedGroupIds=SOME_STRING_VALUE&queryId=qry_xxxxxxxx&take=100&skip=0", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

post.description: Automatically fill a cell in a specific record and field

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/%7BrecordId%7D/%7BfieldId%7D/auto-fill \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("POST", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/%7BrecordId%7D/%7BfieldId%7D/auto-fill", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

fields.description: Objects with a fields key mapping fieldId or field name to value for that field.

autoNumber.description: Auto number, a unique identifier for each record

createdTime.description: Created time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

lastModifiedTime.description: Last modified time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

post.description: Submit a record through a form view. This will trigger "When form submitted" automations.

fields.description: Objects with a fields key mapping fieldId or field name to value for that field.
Objects with a fields key mapping fieldId or field name to value for that field.

autoNumber.description: Auto number, a unique identifier for each record

createdTime.description: Created time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

lastModifiedTime.description: Last modified time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/form-submit \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"viewId":"string","fields":{"property1":null,"property2":null},"typecast":true}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"viewId\":\"string\",\"fields\":{\"property1\":null,\"property2\":null},\"typecast\":true}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/form-submit", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
